name: sc4sap
description: SuperClaude for SAP (sc4sap) transforms Claude Code into a full-stack SAP development assistant. It connects to your SAP system via the MCP ABAP ADT server (150+ tools) to create, read, update, and delete ABAP objects directly — classes, function modules, reports, CDS views, and more. The plugin includes 25 SAP-specialized agents (core dev agents + BC consultant + 14 module consultants for SD, MM, FI, CO, PP, PS, PM, QM, TR, HCM, WM, TM, Ariba, BW), 14 workflow skills (autopilot, ralph, team orchestration, deep-interview, etc.), and built-in SPRO configuration reference with BAPI lists, transaction codes, and representative workflows for every module. Designed for SAP consultants, ABAP developers, and Basis administrators working with On-Premise S/4HANA systems.

plugins.name: sc4sap
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for SAP ABAP development on On-Premise S/4HANA — 25 specialized agents, 16 skills, and SPRO config reference for 14 modules.

examples.title: ABAP Class Creation & Unit Testing
examples.prompt: Create a custom sales order validation class ZCL_SD_ORDER_VALIDATOR with methods for credit check, delivery date validation, and pricing verification. Include ABAP Unit tests for each method.

examples.title: Cross-Module Integration Analysis
examples.prompt: Analyze the integration points between SD billing (VF01) and FI accounting document posting. Show me which BAPIs and user exits are involved in the billing-to-accounting flow.

examples.title: SPRO Configuration Reference
examples.prompt: What SPRO configuration tables are needed to set up a new sales organization in SD? List the transaction codes and configuration sequence.

examples.title: Code Review & Refactoring
examples.prompt: Review the function module Z_MM_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE for ABAP Clean Code violations, performance issues, and suggest refactoring to use modern ABAP syntax (inline declarations, NEW, VALUE).

examples.title: Transport Management
examples.prompt: List all open transport requests for user DEVUSER, check for inactive objects, and prepare a release summary for the transports related to the ZSD_* namespace.

examples.title: Debugging & Root Cause Analysis
examples.prompt: The report ZMM_STOCK_REPORT dumps with CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB at line 142. Analyze the SQL statement, check the table structure, and fix the issue.

examples.title: Module Consultant Workflow
examples.prompt: As an FI consultant, help me configure automatic payment program (F110) for vendor payments via bank transfer. What master data, SPRO settings, and custom development are needed?

examples.title: Full Autonomous Development (Autopilot)
examples.prompt: /sc4sap:autopilot Create an ALV report for open purchase orders by vendor with filtering by plant, purchasing organization, and date range. Include totals and subtotals.
